drama.protagonistEntryBeliefs: if I keep the family narrative stable, no one will have to face what really happened
drama.protagonistWounds: the grief that was never allowed to be named
drama.protagonistPressureLines: every attempt to stabilize the story makes the truth harder to bear
drama.protagonistTurningInsights: the family narrative was never protection, it was postponement
drama.protagonistExitBeliefs: truthful naming, even late, is the only form of repair that matters
drama.relationshipEntryDynamics: cooperative on the surface, divided by unspoken versions of the same event
drama.relationshipStressPatterns: each person protects their version of the story while needing the other's version to be true
drama.relationshipRepairConditions: both must accept that their version is incomplete
drama.relationshipExitDynamics: honest about the damage, but no longer protected by shared denial

detective-police.protagonistEntryBeliefs: if I follow procedure correctly, the truth will survive the institution
detective-police.protagonistWounds: a previous case where procedure protected the wrong people
detective-police.protagonistPressureLines: every procedural step reveals that procedure itself is the obstacle
detective-police.protagonistTurningInsights: the system is not broken, it is working exactly as designed
detective-police.protagonistExitBeliefs: truth sometimes requires breaking the procedure meant to protect it
detective-police.relationshipEntryDynamics: professional alliance with unspoken mutual suspicion
detective-police.relationshipStressPatterns: each person needs the other's evidence but cannot fully trust the other's motives
detective-police.relationshipRepairConditions: both must accept that institutional loyalty and truth cannot always coexist
detective-police.relationshipExitDynamics: bound by shared accusation rather than shared procedure

science-fiction.protagonistEntryBeliefs: if I repair the system correctly, civic memory and stability can coexist
science-fiction.protagonistWounds: the knowledge that the system's maintenance is actually curation
science-fiction.protagonistPressureLines: every repair makes the governing model more visible as control
science-fiction.protagonistTurningInsights: the anomaly is not a malfunction, it is the system's true purpose exposed
science-fiction.protagonistExitBeliefs: consent requires the right to remember, even when remembering destabilizes order
science-fiction.relationshipEntryDynamics: technical collaboration with unspoken disagreement about the system's legitimacy
science-fiction.relationshipStressPatterns: each person needs the other's access but cannot agree on what access should reveal
science-fiction.relationshipRepairConditions: both must accept that technical neutrality is a political choice
science-fiction.relationshipExitDynamics: aligned on the side of civic memory rather than system stability

fantasy.protagonistEntryBeliefs: if I honor the inherited rituals, the valley will remain protected
fantasy.protagonistWounds: the knowledge that the rituals protect the bloodline, not the valley
fantasy.protagonistPressureLines: every ritual act reinforces the lie the valley is dying from
fantasy.protagonistTurningInsights: the curse is not the problem, the silence about the founding crime is
fantasy.protagonistExitBeliefs: truthful naming, even at the cost of inheritance, is the only form of belonging that matters
fantasy.relationshipEntryDynamics: mentor-student bond built on partial truth about the founding vow
fantasy.relationshipStressPatterns: the mentor knows more than they can say, the student senses the gap
fantasy.relationshipRepairConditions: the mentor must stop protecting the student from the truth
fantasy.relationshipExitDynamics: bound by shared truthful naming rather than shared ritual silence

romance-relational.protagonistEntryBeliefs: if I keep the collaboration professional, I can protect both the work and myself
romance-relational.protagonistWounds: a previous partnership that collapsed when honesty replaced competence
romance-relational.protagonistPressureLines: every useful gesture makes it harder to maintain professional distance
romance-relational.protagonistTurningInsights: the work was never separate from the feeling, and pretending it was damaged both
romance-relational.protagonistExitBeliefs: honest interdependence is stronger than guarded competence
romance-relational.relationshipEntryDynamics: functional collaboration with unspoken emotional history
romance-relational.relationshipStressPatterns: each person uses the work to avoid naming what the work reveals
romance-relational.relationshipRepairConditions: both must accept that the work and the feeling cannot be separated
romance-relational.relationshipExitDynamics: honest about the risk, but no longer protected by professional distance
